rationale: The cited paper appears as a single supporting reference when the authors justify selecting comic characteristics (especially price and popularity) that may affect promotion success. In the citing paper, it is used as general background for variable choice in the endogeneity-correction setup, not as a core theoretical or methodological basis for the WFF models, identification strategy, or optimization framework. There is no direct extension, refinement, or application of the cited paper's retailer-profit decomposition approach.
